name: FTC Solar, Inc.
business: FTC Solar, Inc. is a global provider of solar tracker systems, supported by proprietary software and value-added engineering services. Its products include the Pioneer and Voyager solar tracker systems, SUNPATH optimization software, and SUNOPS operations management platform. Customers are primarily engineering, procurement and construction companies (EPCs), as well as developers and owners.

exposures.sentence: We are a global provider of solar tracker systems, supported by proprietary software and value-added engineering services.
increasing demand for electricity associated with new data center construction and expansion of the use of artificial intelligence
Our products and services provide tracker solutions for large utility-scale solar and distributed generation projects around the world.

catalysts.event: Release of Pioneer+ High Wind tracker
catalysts.sentence: the release in August 2025, of our Pioneer+ High Wind tracker, engineered to withstand wind speeds up to 150 miles per hour

catalysts.event: Launch of automated 80 high angle stow capability
catalysts.sentence: the launch in September 2025, of an automated 80 high angle stow capability in our flagship 1P Pioneer trackers

On November 11, 2025, we entered into a Membership Interest Purchase Agreement ... pursuant to which we agreed to purchase 100% of the Membership Interests of Alpha Steel, with such transaction closing on November 12, 2025.

catalysts.event: Launch of commercial activity in India market
catalysts.sentence: we launched commercial activity in the India market during 2025

catalysts.event: Principal repayment under Credit Agreement: $2.5 million
catalysts.sentence: $2.5 million of principal will be repaid on May 22, 2026

catalysts.event: Principal repayment under Credit Agreement: $5.0 million
catalysts.sentence: $5.0 million of principal will be repaid on September 30, 2026

tamClaims.claim: Global solar tracker market CAGR >21% from 2026 to 2031
tamClaims.sentence: Based on publicly available information from Mordor Intelligence, the global solar tracker market is projected to achieve a compound annual growth rate in excess of 21% during the period from 2026 to 2031.

tamClaims.claim: North America solar tracker market share 73%
tamClaims.sentence: North America is estimated to have a 73% solar tracker market share while Asia-Pacific is estimated to have a nearly 28% compound annual growth rate from 2026 to 2031.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. solar generation to increase >20% each year in 2026 and 2027
tamClaims.sentence: The U.S. Energy Information Administration, in its January 2026 Short-Term Energy Outlook, estimates that solar generation will lead total electricity generation growth in 2026 and 2027, by increasing more than 20% each year
